strategy: Team challenge, 80,000 health. Round 1 everyone is Polymorphed into a random school form (Marshfellow, Snowball, and so on) with all pips removed. You fight using the form's signature spell.
Cast your form's spell meeting its damage condition to hit Khonsu. If you miss the condition, you get a copy back to try again.
Each successful hit re-polymorphs that wizard into a new form and gives 2 power pips, so adapt to the new kit each time.
Coordinate so Khonsu is hit once per wizard. Then he unpolymorphs the team and polymorphs himself into a boss form (Hunhau, Malus, Personal Daemon, or The Devourer).
He has no resist. Sustain, heal, and keep landing the polymorph hits through the long grind.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he polymorphs every wizard into a random school form for 99 rounds and strips all pips. You fight through the form's spell.
If you cast your form's spell without meeting its damage condition, you get another copy in hand to retry.
Landing a hit re-polymorphs that wizard (new form plus 2 power pips). Once he is hit once per wizard, he unpolymorphs everyone and polymorphs himself.
